title: Dantewada District Assistant Veterinary Field Officer Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
shortInfo: Dantewada District has published the Assistant Veterinary Field Officer (AVFO) (Third Class) Notification 2026 under Advt. No. 285 / P.Ch. / DMF / 2026-27. The recruitment drive aims to fill 4 Assistant Veterinary Field Officer (AVFO) (Third Class) positions. Candidates within the age range of 18 to 35 years and holding 10+2 with Biology along with a 2-year Veterinary Polytechnic Diploma are eligible to apply through Dantewada District Official Website. The application process is active up to 18 June 2026, and candidates can easily access the notification PDF and application details below.

basic_details.job_title: Dantewada District Assistant Veterinary Field Officer Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.short_information: Dantewada District has published the Assistant Veterinary Field Officer (AVFO) (Third Class) Notification 2026 under Advt. No. 285 / P.Ch. / DMF / 2026-27. The recruitment drive aims to fill 4 Assistant Veterinary Field Officer (AVFO) (Third Class) positions. Candidates within the age range of 18 to 35 years and holding 10+2 with Biology along with a 2-year Veterinary Polytechnic Diploma are eligible to apply through Dantewada District Official Website. The application process is active up to 18 June 2026, and candidates can easily access the notification PDF and application details below.

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 18 years Maximum Age: 35 years Age as on 01-01-2026. Age relaxation will be as per government rules.

qualification.details: 10+2 with Biology from a recognized university/institution. 2-year Diploma in Veterinary Polytechnic.

selection_process: Educational Qualification Skill Test Experience Interview
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for Dantewada District Assistant Veterinary Field Officer (AVFO) (Third Class) Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: www.dantewada.nic.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 18-06-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Dantewada District AVFO recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application for the Assistant Veterinary Field Officer (AVFO) posts is 18th June 2026.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for the AVFO post?
faq.answer: There are a total of 4 vacancies for the Assistant Veterinary Field Officer (AVFO) (Third Class) position.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for the AVFO post?
faq.answer: Candidates must have completed 10+2 with Biology and a 2-year Diploma in Veterinary Polytechnic from a recognized institution.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for the AVFO recruitment?
faq.answer: The age limit for the Assistant Veterinary Field Officer (AVFO) posts is between 18 to 35 years as of 1st January 2026.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the AVFO position?
faq.answer: The selected candidates will receive a monthly salary of Rs. 23,350.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process for this recruitment is offline.

faq.question: Q7. Are there any application fees for the AVFO posts?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for these posts.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for the AVFO recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process includes evaluation of Educational Qualification, Skill Test, Experience, and Interview.

faq.question: Q9. Which district is conducting this recruitment?
faq.answer: This recruitment is being conducted by Dantewada District.

faq.question: Q10. What is the advertisement number for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The advertisement number for this recruitment is 285 / P.Ch. / DMF / 2026-27.
